section.heading: Definitions

paragraph.content: The term “covered DOE contractor employee” means any Department of Energy contractor employee determined under section 7385s–4 of this title to have contracted a covered illness through exposure at a Department of Energy facility.
The term “covered illness” means an illness or death resulting from exposure to a toxic substance.
The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Labor.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 106–398, § 1 [div. C, title XXXVI, § 3671], as added Pub. L. 108–375, div. C, title XXXI, § 3161, Oct. 28, 2004, 118 Stat. 2178.)
